text:
There once was a clever little chipmunk who liked dancing.

Every day after breakfast...well, every Tuesday afternoon, the chipmunk would dance like nobody's business. The way he danced?

Well. Imagine a chipmunk who dances like a chimp.

One day, a squirrel heard about this dancing chipmunk. This squirrel was fascinated.

"How interesting," she thought. "A dancing chipmunk?"

That evening, the squirrel decided she’d investigate once more.

She caught a shiny dime.

She hurried home.

She slid the dime into a sugar bowl.

No more dancing!

Just more chips.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
